texto: Whatever that day has given, you have to make it the best of the best. That's one thing I've learned over my years. On days when you can't make everything what you want, do what you do best, make it as positive as possible, and go from there. Learn from your mistakes.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Troy Dumais sobre temas ligados a motivacao. A afirmação “Whatever that day has given, you have to make it the best of the best. That's one thing I've lear…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, day, inspiracional, útil em momentos de inspiracao e inspiracional.
